name: Norwegian Meatballs in Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly combine all ingredients except flour, beef broth, heavy cream, and chopped parsley.
2. Blend well and shape into about twenty-four 1 1/2 meatballs.
3. Roll lightly in flour.
4. Place on rack of broiler pan in preheated 400°F oven for 20 minutes.
5. Drain before serving.
6. Stir heavy cream into broth in Crock pot; mix until smooth.
7. Pour sauce over meatballs, then sprinkle with the chopped parsley.
